risk_statement: An understated or timing-inconsistent horizon can omit the peak liquidity need.
missing_evidence: multi-day | overnight | day 2 | same-day | available when needed | timely availability
recommended_remediation: Document time buckets, peak-need selection, multi-day persistence, and resource monetization timing.

risk_statement: Incorrect fail treatment can omit replacement liquidity or count the same obligation multiple times.
recommended_remediation: Introduce obligation identifiers, persistence roll-forward logic, and explicit recovery eligibility.

risk_statement: Counting unavailable or ineligible resources can create a false LCR surplus.
missing_evidence: unencumbered | encumbered | committed | prearranged funding | same-day | monetization
recommended_remediation: Maintain a resource eligibility register with legal, operational, currency, timing, haircut, and encumbrance attributes.

risk_statement: Overly broad netting can materially suppress peak settlement liquidity.
missing_evidence: legally enforceable | enforceability | same currency | currency | same settlement date | settlement date | gross fallback | gross obligation | bilateral netting | multilateral netting | netting set | default scenario | defaulted member
recommended_remediation: Define legal netting sets, operational compatibility criteria, and an automatic gross fallback.

risk_statement: Weak or incoherent scenarios can fail to expose the model's true liquidity vulnerability.
recommended_remediation: Document severity calibration, dependence structure, historical anchors, and reverse-stress thresholds.

risk_statement: Poor calibration can invalidate member concentration, default-set, and Cover 1/Cover 2 conclusions.
missing_evidence: financing and fails reconciliation | fails reconciliation
recommended_remediation: Retain reconciliation tables, deterministic seeds, distribution diagnostics, and explicit synthetic-data controls.
